info.title: RUN Remix CMS API
info.description: RESTful API for RUN APPAREL's B2B content management system. Manage products, media, categories, and more programmatically.

bearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token authentication for API access

get.description: Retrieve all product categories with optional pagination. Useful for building navigation menus and category landing pages.

200.description: List of categories or paginated categories object

post.description: Add a new category to the catalog. Admin role required.

get.description: Retrieve a category by its SEO-friendly slug. Useful for dynamic routing on the frontend.
Retrieve full details for a specific category.

put.description: Replace a category's entire configuration. Admin role required.

delete.description: Soft-delete a category. Admin role required.

patch.description: Update the sort order and parenting for multiple categories at once. Admin role required.

get.description: Retrieve products with pagination, filtering, and search. Supports bulk retrieval for B2B integrations.

post.description: Add a new product to the catalog. Admin role required.

get.description: Resolve a hierarchical URL path to a product with its full context (category, breadcrumbs, etc.).

200.description: The product with its full context

404.description: Product not found for the given path

get.description: Retrieve full details for a specific product including technical specs and media references.

put.description: Replace a product's entire configuration. Admin role required.

patch.description: Partially update specific fields of a product. Admin role required.

delete.description: Soft-delete a product from the catalog. Admin role required.

get.description: Retrieve GLB/GLTF model metadata for interactive 3D visualization.

404.description: 3D model not found for this product

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of media assets (images, videos, 3D models).
Search for media assets by filename, original name, or tags.
Retrieve metadata for a specific media asset.

delete.description: Permanently delete a media asset and its associated files from storage. Admin role required.

post.description: Upload a single media file (image, video, or GLB). Admin role required.

get.description: Retrieve real-time performance metrics for the media subsystem (processing times, cache hit rates, etc.).
